body.value:
\(...\) and \[...\] aren't default math delimiters
  in pandoc.

  Pandoc's markdown only recognizes $...$ and $$...$$ by
   default. To enable the TeX-style \(...\) / \[...\]
  delimiters, you need the tex_math_single_backslash
  extension:

  pandoc --katex --standalone
  --from=markdown+tex_math_single_backslash --to=html
  test.md -o test.html

\(...\) and \[...\] aren't default math delimiters
  in pandoc.

  Pandoc's markdown only recognizes $...$ and $$...$$ by
   default. To enable the TeX-style \(...\) / \[...\]
  delimiters, you need the tex_math_single_backslash
  extension:

  pandoc --katex --standalone
  --from=markdown+tex_math_single_backslash --to=html
  test.md -o test.html
Fixed — added +tex_math_single_backslash to the Pandoc --from flag. Restart the server and both $...$ and \(...\) / \[...\] delimiters should work now.
